No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course's core goal is to equip 'working teachers' with skills and methods for English language teaching, directly supporting teacher training and skill development (Targets 4.4, 4.c).
evidence: developing the reading and writing skills

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to enhance 'working teachers'' professional skills and confidence, directly contributing to their career development and 'decent work' (Target 8.5).
evidence: developing the reading and writing skills necessary to classroom flexibility and confidence

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly includes discussing 'themes of race and prejudice,' directly addressing social inclusion and reducing inequality (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course focuses on 'Shakespeare's works' and 'other major authors,' contributing to the appreciation and safeguarding of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Discussing 'themes of race and prejudice' and developing 'argumentation and refutation' skills indirectly supports promoting non-discriminatory policies and justice (Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to global partnerships or cooperation.
